name_cn:
New Arrival🆕 Chane1 24a Atelier
Bowling Bag Small Size Black♥
Purchased from counter for 50500 RMB~
Beautiful Alert🔥 The bowling bag that takes center stage 🎳
Simple yet elegant design, full of fashion sense~
The classic black and gold combination is just right💯
The shiny large capacity charm makes it the best travel companion🖤
Hardware: Thick plated 24k vintage gold
Leather: Exclusive crumpled authentic calfskin
Size: 21*33*14.5 cm
